name: S-15 standards-remove removes the operator-added entry from .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf -- '- id: custom-spec
  url: https://x.com
  added_by: operator
' > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-remove.sh" --id custom-spec 2>err.txt && ! grep -q '^- id: custom-spec$' .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && echo removed 1>&2
